full.translate: полный, целый, наполненный, вполне, очень, как раз, валять, кроить широко
mnemonic:
full ['ful]
fully ['fʊli]
***
ПОЛНЫЙ до краёв тот куль. (это) full
***
ВПОЛНЕ достаточно папуле. (это) fully
***
Ведро полное "full" ты тащил "pull".

examples.eng: The car ran at full speed.
I am full of business.
Bob has eaten his full.
The moon is fulling now.
She's full of good ideas.
The sky was full of fire.
It is full of nude rocks.
Her face was full of woe.
The book was full of errors.
Her eyes were full of hate.
She is full of bright ideas.
I was full of glad vigour.
The theory is full of holes.
The job was full of hazards.
examples.ru: Работа была сопряжена с большим риском.

examples.eng: Her voice was full of emotion.
No more, thanks. I'm full.
examples.ru: Спасибо, больше не надо. Я уже сыт.

examples.eng: He leads a full, active life.
The enemy was in full flight.
You know full well what I mean.
examples.ru: Ты прекрасно знаешь, о чём я.

examples.eng: The moon is at the full.
examples.ru: Луна находится в полной фазе. / Луна полная.

examples.eng: He stated his name in full.
the full phase of the moon
a pond full of silvery fish
The team was full of fight.
He was still full of fight.
examples.ru: Он был всё ещё полон боевого задора.

examples.eng: The trunk was full of stuff.
She was dealt a full house.
The stew is full of flavor.
a pan full of congealed fat
a sink full of dirty dishes
